req.title: Reconciliation report
req.statement: The system shall produce a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank; non-zero variance shall open an incident.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-025 mandates daily reconciliation comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank, with automated incident generation on variance. Test suite covers: (1) happy path with zero variance and successful report storage; (2) negative path with unhandled errors during reconciliation; (3) boundary cases at variance thresholds triggering incident severity escalation. Tests use EP to partition variance states, BVA to test threshold boundaries, NEG to exercise error handling, and DT to map variance magnitude to incident severity. All tests target /cron/reconcile endpoint, validate report persistence, and verify incident creation/severity logic.

tests.name: test_reconciliation_zero_variance_report_stored
preconditions: System time is within EOD batch window
actions: Retrieve report from storage by date
Query incidents table for matching date
expected: No incident records created for this reconciliation
trace: R-FIN-025: non-zero variance shall open incident (none triggered)

tests.name: test_reconciliation_positive_variance_incident_created
expected: Report stored with variance=50.00 and incident_opened=true
Incident created with severity LOW for 50 USD variance
trace: R-FIN-025: non-zero variance shall open an incident
R-FIN-025: incident severity based on variance

tests.name: test_reconciliation_boundary_variance_medium_severity
preconditions: Variance exactly at LOW/MEDIUM boundary (5000 USD)
actions: Retrieve incident severity from incident record
expected: Incident severity classified as MEDIUM (boundary value)
trace: R-FIN-025: incident severity based on variance (threshold test)
BVA: test exact boundary at 5000 USD

tests.name: test_reconciliation_high_variance_critical_severity
preconditions: Variance at 51000 USD (just above HIGH threshold)
trace: R-FIN-025: incident severity based on variance (high threshold)

tests.name: test_reconciliation_bank_service_unavailable
actions: Monitor response code and error message
expected: HTTP 503 Service Unavailable OR 504 Gateway Timeout
No report stored for this run

tests.name: test_reconciliation_invalid_payload_rejected
preconditions: Endpoint requires internal_balance, bank_balance, currency fields

tests.name: test_reconciliation_negative_variance_magnitude
preconditions: Variance is -1000 USD (bank higher than ledger)
System treats absolute variance magnitude for severity
trace: R-FIN-025: non-zero variance shall open incident (negative direction)
BVA: test negative variance magnitude boundary
